sky.mix.uk.title: The Greatest Final 07:Taylor v RVB

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest : Watford/Fulham 2006

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest:Liverpool/Chelsea 2001

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Wigan/WHU '11

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest : West Ham/Man Utd '11

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Adventures of Paddington

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Pip and Posy
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Pip and Posy wake up disappointed when the snow they expected hasn't come. However, they soon invent ways to have snowy fun without actual snow. (S2 Ep9)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: PAW Patrol
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Ryder's present ends up in the jungle and Carlos is trapped in a jungle gym, so it's up to the pups to save the present and Carlos. (S7 Ep20)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Rubble & Crew
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a museum! But when there are more dinos than expected, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! (S1 Ep22)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Miss Rabbit arrives with the broken Party Bus - this is a job for Grampy Rabbit! Once fixed, Mummy Rabbit and Rebecca Rabbit arrive with a cake for Grampy Rabbit's birthday! (S8 Ep28)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The children decorate the clubhouse to make it scary for Halloween... but not too scary. The kids give the grownups a tour of the spooky clubhouse. The grownups pretend to be scared! (S8 Ep29)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Tim Rex in Space
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Tim, Tommy and Tia do all they can to stop Grandma leaving, so they can spend more time with her. (S2 Ep19)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Stan & Gran
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A giant albatross is seen near Porthole and Stan has to spot it! But the bird's footprints are bigger than any real albatross. What's going on? (S1 Ep14)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: PAW Patrol
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Alien Easter eggs cause trouble in Adventure Bay. (S11 Ep36)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: When Milo, Lofty and Lark become tour guides for the day at the Royal Castle, they hope to bump into Queen Mabel herself. (S1 Ep17)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: It's almost Christmas and the elves are busy making toys. When there is a problem with the toys, a little bit of magic is needed to save the day. (S1 Ep14)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Miss Rabbit is to be given the Queen's Award for Industry. Peppa and her friends are so excited, because they are going with her to the palace to meet the Queen! (S4 Ep27)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Odo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A terrible stink descends on Forest Camp. It turns out to be Inspector Feathers's fertiliser. (S2 Ep29)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milkshake! Story Den
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A story about two friends who are total opposites. Soft's fluff always gets up Sticky's nose, and Sticky sticks like glue to Soft! Despite their differences, can they stay friends? (S3 Ep7)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Killer on the Run

E4Plus1.uk.description: The Battle Re-enactment One: Fantasy fan Evan plans to wage war on his wedding day. But his emotional bride-to-be Zoe wants a low-key family affair. Will she be made to feel like a queen?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Torn Between Two Lovers: Haley struggles when she must choose between her past and present relationships. Manny returns to college while his girlfriend stays at Jay and Gloria's. (S10 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Good Grief: It's another epic Halloween full of costumes, tricks and treats for the Dunphy-Pritchett-Tucker clan as they deal with huge, unexpected news. (S10 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bella Luna: Gordon visits Italian family restaurant Bella Luna, which is struggling with an inexperienced chef and an owner who won't acknowledge the eatery's flaws. (S7 Ep8) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he's helped: La Galleria 33 in Boston; The Olde Hitching Post in Massachusetts; and the Prohibition Grille in Washington. (S7 Ep9) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Girl Talk: Murray's furniture shop faces big competition from a rival. Beverly gives Barry her advice when his attempts to court a girl at school end in failure. (S5 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Wall Street Thanksgiving: Murray has to intervene when Marvin reveals that he's become a stockbroker and convinces Barry and his friends to invest money with him. (S5 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: I Love a Parade: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan set off more than a few fireworks at the Fourth of July parade, where Jay's the grand marshal. (S10 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Kiss and Tell: Haley asks Mitch and Cam for advice about whether she should tell Arvin about her kiss with Dylan. And Gloria suspects that Manny's Canadian girlfriend isn't real. (S10 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Peter's: Gordon visits Peter's Italian Restaurant in New York, where the peace of Long Island is shattered by the antics of the volatile Pellegrino family who run the place. (S1 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Mixing Bowl: Bijou New York diner The Mixing Bowl is haemorrhaging money thanks to manager Mike's out-of-control marketing plans. Can Gordon get things back on track? (S1 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Karen Peralta: On his birthday, Peralta takes Santiago to meet his mother. Diaz and Boyle struggle to deal with a new mandate on body cams during a stakeout. (S3 Ep14)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The 9-8: Peralta is reunited with his old partner when the Nine-Nine have to host officers from the Nine-Eight precinct because of a flood. (S3 Ep15)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Itchy & Scratchy & Poochie Show: Homer gets a job on The Itchy & Scratchy Show as the voice of hip-hop surfer dog Poochie, a character brought in to boost viewing figures. (S8 Ep14/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer's Phobia: Homer's prejudices surface when Bart befriends a gay shop owner (guest star John Waters). So he decides to take Bart hunting - but it doesn't go to plan. (S8 Ep15/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Scrunchie Rule: Beverly nurses Coach Mellor back to health after a slip-up with rope-climbing equipment. Erica and her roommate begin to annoy each other. (S5 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Colors: Barry tries to break up Beverly's social group to get more of her attention. Adam attempts to trick Murray into loving the theatre. (S5 Ep17)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Blasts from the Past: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before becoming grandparents, and Dylan introduces them to his mum, who has an interesting past. (S10 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Whanex?: While preparing a presentation for his students about future goals, Cam must contend with a bully at the school. Jay has technical trouble during a video conference. (S10 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Coral Palms (Part 1/3): Peralta and Holt adjust to their lives in the Witness Protection Programme while crime boss Jimmy 'The Butcher' Figgis is still at large. (S4 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Coral Palms (Part 2/3): Jimmy Figgis sees Peralta and Holt's video and comes looking for them. A new captain takes over the precinct, but is he up to the job? (S4 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Simpsons Spin-Off Showcase: Troy McClure hosts a vision of the future of The Simpsons, in which Chief Wiggum becomes private detective Wiggum, P.I. (S8 Ep24/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Secret War of Lisa Simpson: Bart and Lisa enrol in military school, but Lisa finds it hard to fit in. Guest starring Willem Dafoe. (S8 Ep25/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Stew Lies: Homer's obsessed with an extreme eating show. Somehow, that ends up with him getting chased by the mob when a stew recipe is stolen from Fat Tony. (S36 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Teenage Mutant Milk-Caused Hurdles: Bart is smitten with his new teacher and tries to impress her. Homer buys a new type of milk that has a strange effect on Bart and Lisa. (S27 Ep11/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: James Acaster, Russell Tovey, Rylan Clark-Neal and Michelle Keegan tackle flapjacks, and make their 'happy places' out of meringues.

E4Plus1.uk.title: The King's Man
E4Plus1.uk.description: (2021) The spy-caper franchise continues with the origins story of the Kingsman agency, as a plucky group battle an international conspiracy at the outbreak of WWI. With Ralph Fiennes.

Film4.uk.title: The Hunt
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.

Film4.uk.title: Straightheads
Film4.uk.description: (2007) Thriller with Gillian Anderson and Danny Dyer. On their way home from a party in the countryside, a couple are brutally attacked by thugs. Months later, they set out for vengeance.

Film4.uk.title: Countdown
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Supernatural horror. A nurse downloads an app which predicts that she'll be dead within days. As she uncovers its demonic roots, can she change her fate? Violence.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Shadow of a Doubt
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Hitchcock thriller starring Joseph Cotten as a serial killer fleeing the law. Teresa Wright is his adoring niece who, initially, refuses to believe her uncle is a murderer.

Film4.uk.title: The Virginian
Film4.uk.description: (1946) Western romance starring Joel McCrea and Sonny Tufts as a couple of cowboys who compete for the affections of a new schoolteacher from out east, played by Barbara Britton.

Film4.uk.title: Fixed Bayonets!
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

Film4.uk.title: Anzio
Film4.uk.description: (1968) Epic Second World War drama starring Robert Mitchum. A reporter gets trapped behind enemy lines during the costly 1944 Allied invasion of Italy. With Peter Falk and Robert Ryan.

Film4.uk.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
Film4.uk.description: (1999) Teen comedy with Julia Stiles and Heath Ledger. A student is furious to discover her prom date was bribed by her sister to invite her. But confusion ensues when he falls for her.

Film4.uk.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
Film4.uk.description: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

Film4.uk.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
Film4.uk.description: (2018) Rami Malek turns in an Oscar-winning performance as Freddie Mercury in this rollercoaster musical biopic of the late Queen frontman. Big tunes. Big drama. Bigger teeth.

Film4.uk.title: With or Without You
Film4.uk.description: (1999) Couple Christopher Eccleston and Dervla Kirwin's relationship is tested when her former pen pal, Yvan Attal, turns up in Michael Winterbottom's drama. Strong language/sexual scenes.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Warlock
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Western starring Henry Fonda. A gunfighter is hired to protect a town from a raiding gang. But a vendetta could undermine him. With Anthony Quinn, Richard Widmark and Dorothy Malone.

Film4.uk.title: Decision at Sundown
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Western starring Randolph Scott and John Carroll. A man seeking revenge for his wife's death tracks his rival down in the sleepy town of Sundown...

Film4.uk.title: Arizona Raiders
Film4.uk.description: (1965) William Whitney's brutal western. Two former Confederate rebels are offered their freedom if they can track, catch or even kill their former gang mates. Starring Audie Murphy.

Film4.uk.title: Sink the Bismarck!
Film4.uk.description: (1960) Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

Film4.uk.title: Sleepless in Seattle
Film4.uk.description: (1993) Romantic comedy with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan. A bereaved man gets another chance at love when his son puts him on a radio talk show.

Film4.uk.title: White House Down
Film4.uk.description: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

Film4.uk.title: Sicario 2: Soldado
Film4.uk.description: (2018) Action sequel with Benicio Del Toro and Josh Brolin. Two operatives must create a gang war to stop Mexican drug cartels smuggling terrorists into the US.

Film4.uk.title: Heatwave
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Erotic thriller with Kat Graham. Claire gets more than she bargained for when she begins a steamy affair with her boss's wife. But she's got her own dark past too.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Comancheros
Film4.uk.description: (1961) Western starring John Wayne and Stuart Whitman. A Texas Ranger is forced to team up with his prisoner while he's on a covert mission to take on a band of thieves and gunrunners.

Film4.uk.title: Sea Wife
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

Film4.uk.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
Film4.uk.description: (1939) John Ford western with Henry Fonda and Claudette Colbert. In 1776, a settler and his wife attempt to farm in the Mohawk Valley but face attacks from Native Americans and the English.

Film4.uk.title: The Mark of Zorro
Film4.uk.description: (1940) Swashbuckling action-adventure starring Tyrone Power. An aristocrat dons his mask and cape to fight for the rights of the poor in 19th-century California. With Basil Rathbone.

Film4.uk.title: Men in Black: International
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.

Film4.uk.title: The Last Stand
Film4.uk.description: (2013) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker. A small-town sheriff and his inexperienced staff take on a drug cartel boss who's fleeing to Mexico.

Film4.uk.title: Warlock
Film4.uk.description: (1989) Fantasy horror with Julian Sands and Richard E Grant. Using magic, an evil warlock flees to 80s LA from the olde-worlde. Can he unmake creation before a witch-finder tracks him down?

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Renfield
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2023) Comedy horror vampire shenanigans with Nicholas Hoult, Awkwafina and a full-blooded Nicolas Cage. Dracula's familiar gets distracted from procuring food for his master.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: The Hunt

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight
GBNews.uk.description: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Late...
GBNews.uk.description: Edition. Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Patrick Christys.

GBNews.uk.title: The Late Show Live
GBNews.uk.description: Live from Washington DC, Bev Turner and Ben Leo bring you the latest from the US and what it means for Britain.

GBNews.uk.title: Farage
GBNews.uk.description: Nigel Farage doesn't hold back in his GB News prime-time show. Hear his views and give your own in an hour of discussion and debate. Join Nigel as he takes on the big stories other media won't touch.

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Cathedral of Sewage: Exploring an ominous tower in the forests of Croatia, a New York City complex that broke the mould, and a grand facility guarding the London riverbanks. S8 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterday.uk.description: The Secret Bunker: Exploring a desert island with an infected past adrift from the US mainland, the brutalist palace of a mad Bulgarian dictator, and a doomed top-secret Nazi project. S8 Ep7

UAndYesterday.uk.title: True Evil: The Making Of A Nazi
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Adolf Eichmann: A profile of Adolf Eichmann, the bureaucratic civil servant whose robotic willingness to follow orders led him to design the system that would bring about the holocaust. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Aston DB6/Jaguar E-type: A 1967 Aston Martin DB6 lands at the Mathewsons' - Derek believes it could break the record for the most expensive car ever sold at the auction. S5 Ep9

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Austin Metro/Fiat 850 Coupe: A collection of Austin Mini Metros arrive for auction. Also under the hammer is a baby Fiat 850 coupe and a haulier offloads part of his vintage vehicle collection. S5 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: True Evil: The Making Of A Nazi

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Secret Nazi Bases

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Airmen De-Nicked: Hop over the channel for a rendezvous with Rene and his wartime chums. Using hijacked German uniforms, Michelle of the Resistance plans to infiltrate German HQ. S6 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Crooked Fences: Saucy wartime sitcom that's a big hit across Europe. Cafe Rene is the venue for a clandestine deal involving the infamous Fallen Madonna and a cuckoo clock weight. S6 Ep6
